requirement_summary: Build real H1 OHLCV history backfill module for MT5 trading bot. Pull >=5000 H1 bars per symbol via MT5 bridge, write idempotently to bridge_data/history/<SYMBOL>_H1.parquet, runnable as script, with mocked unit tests.

phase_1_5.notes: Small scope (4 tasks); plan review folded into Plan analysis.

phase_2.notes: Context recon done during Plan; bridge client, parquet schema, config all read.

phase_3.notes: No infra surface; baseline 324 tests confirmed before implementation.

phase_4_5.notes: 357 passed (324 baseline + 33 new), 0 failed. python -m pytest -q, 38.78s.

phase_5.notes: Self-review: existing 324 tests untouched. New 33 tests all pass. No synthetic fallback in new code path; BridgeUnavailableError raised on bridge failure. Atomic write via os.replace.

escalations.summary: pipeline-orchestrator subagent lacked Agent/Bash/Grep tools; main thread took over orchestration after design gate.
escalations.resolution: User authorized main-thread orchestration; all phases completed.

escalations.summary: Pagination loop is degenerate today: bridge /history endpoint accepts only bars count, no offset. Wrapper preserved the seam; documented in plan.md and build-summary.md.
